Table of Contents

Class Acceso

Namespace
Domain.Composite
Assembly
Domain.dll

Abstract base component of the Composite design pattern used to model the permission tree.

public abstract class Acceso
Inheritance
object
Acceso
Derived
Familia
Patente
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

A permission tree is composed of Familia interior nodes and Patente leaf nodes. All tree traversal and permission checks operate against the Acceso abstraction, allowing uniform treatment of individual permissions and permission groups.

Constructors

Acceso() 

protected Acceso()

Properties

Accesos

Returns the direct children of this node. Leaf nodes (Patente) always return an empty list.

public abstract List<Acceso> Accesos { get; }

Property Value

List<Acceso>

Id

Unique identifier of this access component.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Nombre

Human-readable display name.

public string Nombre { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Methods

Agregar(Acceso)

Adds componente as a direct child of this node.

public abstract void Agregar(Acceso componente)

Parameters

componente Acceso

The component to add.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown by leaf nodes (Patente) that do not support children.

Eliminar(Acceso)

Removes componente from the direct children of this node.

public abstract void Eliminar(Acceso componente)

Parameters

componente Acceso

The component to remove, matched by Id.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown by leaf nodes (Patente) that do not support children.

public override string ToString()

Returns
